hardware.name: Android smartphones
hardware.summary: Run safeT Mobile on the Android phones your team already carries — no dedicated radio purchase required.
features: On-screen PTT button (no hardware key required)

hardware.name: Inrico IRC590
hardware.summary: Ultracompact rugged LTE radio with a dedicated hardware PTT button, side keys, and emergency key — the same safeT Mobile app, radio-native ergonomics.

hardware.name: Inrico TM7 / TM7 Plus
hardware.summary: Compact touch radio with a larger display, hardware PTT, volume knob, and the full safeT Mobile experience for field supervisors and patrol.
requirements: Inrico TM7 or TM7 Plus handset
features: Touch display for channel and zone selection
Ideal for in-vehicle and foot patrol

platforms.name: Android
platforms.summary: Primary client. Install the signed safeT Mobile APK from your agency admin (Control → Downloads).
platforms.notes: Production-ready for phones and Inrico hardware.

platforms.name: iOS (iPhone & iPad)
platforms.summary: safeT Mobile for iOS is in active development. Agencies with Apple fleets can request early access.
platforms.notes: Requires Xcode build or TestFlight distribution from your platform operator today — App Store release planned.

platforms.name: Web browser
platforms.summary: Chrome, Edge, Firefox, or Safari — no install required. Dispatchers use safeT Command; admins use Control; radio-role users get a browser soft radio.
platforms.notes: Recommended: current Chrome or Edge on desktop; modern mobile Safari for lightweight field use.

platforms.name: Windows desktop
platforms.summary: safeT Command desktop shell (Electron) wraps the dispatch console as a native Windows app with microphone access for console PTT.
platforms.notes: Installer built from the desktop-console package; loads your hosted console URL.

platforms.name: macOS desktop
platforms.summary: Same safeT Command desktop shell for Mac dispatch workstations — .dmg installer with microphone permission prompts handled natively.
platforms.notes: Built from desktop-console; ideal for comm centers standardizing on Mac minis.

platforms.name: Linux desktop
platforms.summary: AppImage build of the safeT Command desktop shell for Linux dispatch stations.
platforms.notes: Use when your comm center runs Ubuntu or similar on dispatch PCs.
